dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Yeay! You really did it! Thanks to you, i can prepare for my test well!

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Huh? You don’t know that Ma’am Irma will give us an English Test soon? Smh..

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Then i shall give you a exercise then!
